message:
ast: fix display round-trip — parenthesize binary ops + IS NULL

Fix critical round-trip correctness in Expr Display:
- Add write_paren_if_binop helper that wraps binary op children in parens
- Apply to BinaryOp, UnaryOp, Between, In, Like, Collate, IsNull, JsonAccess
- Change ISNULL output to IS NULL for parser compatibility
- Fix CTE materialized placement: AS MATERIALIZED (...) not MATERIALIZED AS

Without parenthesization, (1 + 2) * 3 would display as 1 + 2 * 3 which
re-parses with wrong associativity. All 179 parser tests + 33 round-trip
tests pass.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
